data.name: SEX, Stocks & Cocks
data.detailed_description:
SEX, Stocks & Cocks is an exciting visual novel for adults that immerses you in a world of intrigue, fraud, and sexual passion. As the protagonist, you will find yourself in the midst of a large stock brokerage firm, where everyone hides their secrets and motivations.

With a devoted bride and her cunning mother, you delve into the dark world of corporate games, the goal of which is to destroy the company from within. By gaining the trust of your colleagues and manipulating them, you uncover the secrets necessary to carry out your plan, but not everyone is cooperative.

The suspenseful plot presents new challenges when the director's niece, Adele, realizes your intentions and begins to play her own game. Will you be able to fulfill your plan by satisfying your lover's interests, or will you choose a different path, switching sides and confronting your own beliefs?

SEX, Stocks & Cocks is not just a game; it's an immersive experience that will evoke your deepest emotions and challenge your perceptions of intrigue and cunning.

Features:
  • Deep Character Relationships: Explore complex relationships with various characters, each with their own desires, motivations, and secrets that can affect the outcome of the story.
  • Intriguing side quests: Discover hidden secrets, solve puzzles, and take on side quests that offer valuable rewards .
  • Intuitive User Interface: Enjoy a user-friendly interface designed for seamless navigation and accessibility, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable gaming experience for players of all skill levels.
  • Sensual Visuals: Experience breathtaking artwork and stunning visuals that depict intimate moments and seductive encounters in exquisite detail, designed to tantalize the senses and ignite your imagination.
  • Interactive Love Scenes: Immerse yourself in interactive love scenes with realistic animations and dynamic camera angles that allow you to control the pace and intensity of the encounter, creating a truly immersive and unforgettable experience.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
